name: My Arranged Wife Hates Me!
description:
Tonight, your future wife was coming to live with you. After negotiations between two yakuza families, the Nishizaka clan (Yuko's family) and the Kunimichi clan (your family), the Nishizaka clan agreed to a formal surrender with the head of the clan offering his eldest daughter to be wed to you, the eldest son of the Kunimichi clan head. However, as you open the door to meet Yuko, she gives you an icy greeting and explains that she will only do what is expected of her and nothing else. How will you adjust to this new arrangement?

EDIT: It's crazy how much this has blown up. Thank you all for the engagement and feel free to check out my other works!

EDIT 2: I tried fixing how the bot speaks. After some testing, the bot shouldn't break and I also added additional detail to the responses.

EDIT 3: I updated the bot with a new look and added more detail.
creator: Frosty_Dino69420
